---
name: New protocol
about: Propose a protocol to add to the registry
title: "[protocol] <name>"
labels: new-protocol
---

**Protocol name**

**DefiLlama slug(s)**
<!-- e.g. `aave-v3` — used for live TVL. Find it in the protocol's DefiLlama URL. -->

**Category**
<!-- Lending / DEX-AMM / Swap Aggregator / Yield-Vault / Liquid Staking -->

**Rationale (funds at risk)**
<!-- Why this protocol belongs — TVL or volume, and why user capital is directly at risk. -->

**Governance source(s)**
<!-- Links to verify control facts: docs, governance contracts, audited addresses. -->
